fields.In-Network Tier 4 RX: 30% coinsurance up to $250 / 40% coinsurance up to $250
fields.Deductible Explanation: Embedded deductible and out-of-pocket limit mean cost shares of one family member apply to per member limits; family amounts apply to both family deductible and family out-of-pocket limit. Deductibles and out-of-pocket limits are separate and do not accumulate.
fields.In-Network RX: Tier 1 (Typically Generic): $20 / Tier 2 (Typically Preferred Brand): $60 / Tier 3 (Typically Non-Preferred Brand): $100 / Tier 4 (Typically Specialty): 40% coinsurance up to $250
fields.Preferred Network RX: Tier 1 (Typically Generic): $10 / Tier 2 (Typically Preferred Brand): $50 / Tier 3 (Typically Non-Preferred Brand): $90 / Tier 4 (Typically Specialty): 30% coinsurance up to $250
